title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.620 - Proxy voting, requirements
text:
115.620.  Proxy voting, requirements. — Provisions for proxy voting for district committees organized under section 115.621 may be made by a political party.  In the event that such provisions are not made, proxy voting shall only be allowed for legislative, congressional, senatorial, and judicial district committee meetings.  In any event, a person may only serve as a proxy voter if such person is legally permitted to vote in the district in which the proxy resides.
(L. 2016 H.B. 1477 merged with S.B. 786)
Effective 7-07-16
